title: Під водою
color: Normal 10-bit for direct use; D-Log M for grading
wb: Auto shallow; custom/locked with video light at depth
uses: Diving to 20 m bare / 60 m in case
cons: Red light is lost with depth
mistakes: Using in hot springs or corrosive liquids
tips: DJI recommends the waterproof case for long sessions or high water-impact pressure. Limit ISO before adding aggressive denoise.
